name.ja: <ruby>霊<rt>れい</rt></ruby><ruby>力<rt>りょく</rt></ruby><ruby>回<rt>かい</rt></ruby><ruby>復<rt>ふく</rt></ruby><ruby>薬<rt>やく</rt></ruby>

text.en:
(This card is always treated as a "Possessed" card.)
Banish any number of Spellcaster monsters and/or Spells from your GY; all monsters you currently control gain 200 ATK for each card banished this way, and if they do, you gain 400 LP for each card banished this way. During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon any number of Spellcaster monsters with different Attributes from your hand. You can only use 1 "Spiritual Power Recovery Potion" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
text.zh-CN: 此卡名在规则上也视为“凭依”卡。此卡名的①②效果1回合1次，仅可使用其中1个。①：将自己墓地任意数量的魔法师族怪兽及魔法卡除外可以发动。自己场上的所有怪兽的攻击力上升所除外数量×200的数值，自己恢复所除外数量×400LP。②：在自己的主要阶段，将墓地的此卡除外可以发动。从手牌将任意数量的魔法师族怪兽特殊召唤（相同属性最多1只）。
